illusionConnectReCodes.title: Illusion Connect Re Codes
illusionConnectReCodes.intro: Use Illusion Connect Re codes to pick up launch rewards, social event gifts, and quick resource boosts. Enter each code exactly as shown from the in-game redeem menu.
illusionConnectReCodes.stepsTitle: How to Redeem Illusion Connect Re Codes
steps: Launch Illusion Connect: Re and finish the opening tutorial until the main lobby is unlocked.
Tap your avatar in the top-left corner to open the account menu.
Enter Settings and choose the Redeem option.
Paste the code exactly as shown, then confirm the submission.
Open your mailbox or reward pop-up and claim the items immediately.

illusionConnectReTierList.title: Illusion Connect Re Tier List
illusionConnectReTierList.intro: This Illusion Connect Re tier list focuses on launch-week value for rerolls, early story progress, and stable team building rather than long-tail niche modes.

tiers.name: S Tier
tiers.description: These Radiants deliver the strongest immediate account power when you are pushing story and clearing wave-heavy stages.

characters.name: Yuffie
characters.bestFor: Wave clears and fast campaign progress
characters.summary: Yuffie is the strongest early damage chase because her burst clears multi-enemy boards quickly and speeds up reroll payoffs.

characters.name: Anna
characters.summary: Anna keeps beginner teams alive through long stages and gives immediate value in any stable launch roster.

tiers.name: A Tier
tiers.description: These picks stay strong if you want a balanced start without rerolling forever for a perfect account.

characters.name: Miyuki
characters.bestFor: Daily story farming and flexible team cores
characters.summary: Miyuki offers dependable damage output and fits both reroll accounts and login-reward progression plans.

characters.name: Kiraya
characters.bestFor: Frontline stability and protecting your backline
characters.summary: Kiraya is one of the safest launch tanks because she buys time for your carries and keeps the leader safer.

tiers.name: Support Core
tiers.description: A strong start still needs role coverage, so build around damage, sustain, and frontline control instead of chasing one carry only.

characters.name: AoE damage slot
characters.summary: Open with a dependable AoE unit to keep clears fast and energy-efficient.

characters.name: Healer or shield slot
characters.summary: One sustain slot stabilizes your run far more than stacking another fragile damage dealer.

illusionConnectReRerollGuide.title: Illusion Connect Re Reroll Guide
illusionConnectReRerollGuide.intro: An efficient Illusion Connect Re reroll route should minimize menu downtime, use the earliest summons, and stop once your opening roster already supports campaign progress.
illusionConnectReRerollGuide.targetsTitle: Illusion Connect Re Best Starter Targets
illusionConnectReRerollGuide.stopTitle: When to Stop an Illusion Connect Re Reroll

steps.title: Finish the tutorial fast
steps.description: Skip every optional dialogue scene, clear the opening combat sequence, and unlock the first lobby rewards before checking banners.

steps.title: Collect all launch mail
steps.description: Claim pre-registration bonuses, starter gifts, and any launch mailbox rewards before you spend your first batch of pulls.

steps.title: Pull on the highest-value opening banner
steps.description: Use the banner that gives the fastest access to a top damage dealer or healer instead of splitting resources across multiple early banners.

steps.title: Reset quickly if the account misses
steps.description: If the first pull cycle does not give at least one premium carry or sustain piece, restart immediately rather than trying to repair a weak opening.

targets.name: Yuffie
targets.reason: Fastest story-clear payoff and a strong reason to keep the account.

targets.name: Anna
targets.reason: Adds immediate roster stability and improves event survivability.

targets.name: Miyuki
targets.reason: A dependable fallback if you want a balanced account without overextending reroll time.

stopRules: Stop when you open with one premium damage dealer and one reliable sustain piece.
Stop if the account has Yuffie or Anna plus enough early currency to keep progressing.
Stop once the roster can cover frontline, AoE damage, and healing for the first story chapters.

illusionConnectReBeginnerGuide.title: Illusion Connect Re Beginner Guide
illusionConnectReBeginnerGuide.intro: Illusion Connect Re is a real-time anime strategy RPG where you lead Radiants against Nightmares. New players should focus on learning formation timing, building a balanced early team, and saving premium currency for meaningful summons and upgrades.

steps.title: Finish the tutorial first
steps.description: Use the tutorial to learn real-time battles, hero deployment, formation shifts, and Ultimate Skill timing before changing your team too much.
steps.priority: Unlock core combat systems and understand how Radiants fight Nightmares.
steps.avoid: Do not judge a team only by raw power before learning deployment cost and formation timing.

steps.title: Claim launch and pre-registration rewards
steps.description: Check launch rewards, pre-registration rewards, event rewards, and official social gift-code events before spending Diamonds.
steps.priority: Start with free Summon Tickets, Diamonds, Gold, Crystals, and reward Radiants when available.
steps.avoid: Do not spend paid or premium currency before checking all free launch rewards.

steps.title: Build one balanced starter team
steps.description: Use a simple team shell: front-line protection, one or two damage dealers, at least one healer or sustain option, and support units that help with timing or control.
steps.priority: A stable team clears early stages better than a random group of high-rarity units.
steps.avoid: Do not upgrade every new Radiant immediately.

steps.title: Spend Summon Tickets before Diamonds
steps.description: Use free Summon Tickets from launch rewards and milestones first, then decide whether a banner is worth Diamonds.
steps.priority: Keep Diamonds for banners, stamina, or progression needs that give clear account value.
steps.avoid: Do not empty Diamonds on every early pull just because the account is new.

steps.title: Upgrade your core team first
steps.description: Focus upgrade materials on the Radiants you actually use in battle. Prioritize your main damage unit, key front-line unit, and main healer or support.
steps.priority: Early materials matter more when concentrated on a small team.
steps.avoid: Do not spread Gold, Crystals, and upgrade items across unused characters.

steps.title: Use bonds and Dream Base progress
steps.description: Spend time with companions, increase bonds, and use Dream Base features because relationships can unlock new abilities as bonds deepen.
steps.priority: Out-of-battle growth supports long-term account strength.
steps.avoid: Do not treat home and bond systems as only decoration.

illusionConnectReRadiantsAndBestTeam.title: Illusion Connect Re Radiants and Best Team
illusionConnectReRadiantsAndBestTeam.intro: Illusion Connect Re includes over 130 illustrated characters with Live2D animation, unique abilities, personalities, and battle roles. Instead of copying only a raw tier list, build around class counters, deployment cost, skill characteristics, and formation needs.

items.title: Radiants
items.description: Radiants are the partners who fight Nightmares and protect the real world from threats coming from the Dream World.
items.bestUse: Build a roster with different battle roles so you can adjust formation and timing during real-time combat.

items.title: Front Line
items.description: Your front line should help absorb pressure and create time for damage dealers and support units to act.
items.bestUse: Place durable Radiants where enemy pressure is strongest and adjust formation when the battlefield changes.

items.title: Damage Dealers
items.description: Damage-focused Radiants are the core of early progression because they help clear Nightmares faster.
items.bestUse: Choose one or two main damage units and upgrade them before spreading materials across too many characters.

items.title: Healers and Sustain
items.description: Healers and sustain-focused Radiants help keep your team alive during longer fights and difficult stages.
items.bestUse: Keep at least one healing or sustain option ready when a stage cannot be cleared by burst damage alone.

items.title: Support and Skill Timing
items.description: Support Radiants are useful when their skill timing, class matchups, or deployment cost helps turn a fight.
items.bestUse: Use support units to strengthen your core team instead of adding only more damage.

items.title: Starter Reward Slots
items.description: Launch and pre-registration rewards include useful starter resources such as SSR Partner Fenebeth, SR Partner Beatrice, Summon Tickets, Diamonds, Gold, Crystals, and upgrade items.
items.bestUse: Use reward Radiants and free summon resources to shape your first team before spending heavily.

illusionConnectReGameplayAndBattleSystem.title: Illusion Connect Re Gameplay and Battle System
illusionConnectReGameplayAndBattleSystem.intro: Illusion Connect Re mixes anime gacha collection, real-time tactical combat, 3x3 grid strategy, formation changes, and Ultimate Skill timing.

items.title: Real-Time Battles
items.summary: Combat happens in real time, so timing and formation changes matter.
items.details: Players direct heroes, shift formations during battle, and combine Radiant strengths to overcome powerful Nightmares.

items.title: 3x3 Grid Strategy
items.summary: The battlefield uses a tactical 3x3 grid system.
items.details: Players deploy their lineup on a changing battlefield while considering class counters, deployment cost, and skill characteristics.

items.title: Deployment Cost
items.summary: Every deployment decision has timing value.
items.details: A strong team is not only about rarity. Good deployment cost management helps players place the right Radiant at the right moment.

items.title: Ultimate Skills
items.summary: Ultimate Skills can change the result of a fight.
items.details: Players should save high-impact skills for dangerous waves, boss pressure, or moments when a single strike can turn the battle.

items.title: Nightmares
items.summary: Nightmares are the main enemy threat.
items.details: In the story, Nightmares come from the Dream World and threaten the real world, giving battles their main conflict.

items.title: Auto Battle and Idle AFK
items.summary: Auto battle and idle AFK elements exist, but strategy remains important.
items.details: The game supports anime RPG gacha collection and auto battle, while the core combat still rewards manual timing, formation control, and team planning.

items.title: Bonds and Dream Base
items.details: Players can spend time with companions, deepen bonds, unlock abilities, and decorate a personal Dream Base with furniture and wallpapers.

illusionConnectReLaunchRewardsAndEvents.title: Illusion Connect Re Launch Rewards and Events
illusionConnectReLaunchRewardsAndEvents.intro: Illusion Connect Re launched with pre-registration rewards and milestone rewards tied to player sign-up goals. Official social channels also run comment and group events where players can win gift codes or in-game rewards.

items.title: Official Facebook Gift Code Events
items.requirement: Follow the official Facebook page, like event posts, and comment as instructed

items.title: Official Group Event
items.requirement: Join the official Facebook Group and follow the event instructions

items.title: Launch Day Update
items.requirement: Log in after launch and check official event notices

faq.title: Illusion Connect Re
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for the most common Illusion Connect Re launch questions.

questions.question: What is Illusion Connect Re?
questions.answer: Illusion Connect Re is an anime strategy RPG built around real-time combat, Radiant team building, bond progression, and Dream Home account systems.

questions.question: How do Illusion Connect Re codes work?
questions.answer: Illusion Connect Re codes are entered through the in-game Redeem menu after the tutorial unlocks the main lobby account options.

questions.question: Is Illusion Connect Re rerolling worth it?
questions.answer: Illusion Connect Re rerolling is worth it if you want a stronger launch start, especially when you are aiming for a premium AoE carry or a top healer.

questions.question: What makes a strong Illusion Connect Re team?
questions.answer: A strong Illusion Connect Re team combines one frontline anchor, one reliable sustain option, and enough damage to clear both waves and elite targets.

questions.question: Where can I download Illusion Connect Re?
questions.answer: Illusion Connect Re is available from the official Google Play and App Store pages for Android and iOS players.

questions.question: Which Illusion Connect Re events matter most at launch?
questions.answer: The most important Illusion Connect Re launch events are the pre-registration rewards, login tracks, social reward drops, and story-linked event missions.
